codeReview.summary: Comprehensive profile tests with excellent coverage of all 7 VAL-PROFILE assertions (19 test cases). Tests are well-structured, use proper Playwright patterns (role-based selectors, networkidle waits), and include good edge case coverage including accessibility validation and whitespace-only name validation. Minor issue: some helper function duplication with existing test-db-helpers.ts.

issues.description: Logout button selector inconsistency: profile-comprehensive.spec.ts uses getByRole('button', { name: /Log out/i }) (regex) while navigation-smoke.spec.ts and profile-persistence.spec.ts use getByRole('button', { name: 'Log out of your account' }) (literal string). Both approaches are valid but inconsistent.
issues.suggestedFix: Standardize on one pattern across all test files. If the button text can vary, use the regex approach; otherwise use the literal string for consistency.

issues.description: Helper function duplication: createProfile, registerAndGetToken, and clearAllData helpers in profile-comprehensive.spec.ts duplicate functionality available in e2e/test-db-helpers.ts (registerTestUser, setAuthToken, clearTestData). While the test's createProfile handles the onboarding UI flow specifically, the overlap suggests potential for shared helper extraction.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider extracting a reusable createProfileFromOnboarding helper to e2e/test-db-helpers.ts for other tests that need to go through the onboarding flow.

issues.description: goToProfilePage and goToHomePage helpers call page.waitForLoadState('networkidle') but are not awaited by callers in some tests. This works because the subsequent expect() calls wait for elements, but awaiting these helpers would make the test flow more explicit.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider having callers await goToProfilePage(page) before subsequent assertions for clearer test intent.

sharedStateObservations.observation: AGENTS.md mentions 'Create shared helpers in e2e/helpers.ts' but the worker used inline helper functions in the test file rather than adding to e2e/helpers.ts or even e2e/test-db-helpers.ts which already exists. The project has two helper files (e2e/helpers.ts doesn't exist, but e2e/test-db-helpers.ts does) with overlapping functionality.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: e2e/test-db-helpers.ts already has registerTestUser, setAuthToken, clearAuthToken, clearTestData, createAuthenticatedPage. Worker created duplicate registerAndGetToken, clearAllData, createProfile in profile-comprehensive.spec.ts:15-75

sharedStateObservations.observation: Logout button selector pattern varies across test files. AGENTS.md doesn't document the expected pattern for logout button selectors, leading to inconsistency (regex in some files, literal string in others).
sharedStateObservations.evidence: profile-comprehensive.spec.ts:546 uses /Log out/i regex while navigation-smoke.spec.ts:338 uses 'Log out of your account' literal string

summary: Profile comprehensive e2e tests pass review. All 7 VAL-PROFILE assertions (VAL-PROFILE-001 through VAL-PROFILE-007) are thoroughly covered with 19 test cases including positive paths, negative validation, accessibility checks, and persistence verification. Tests are well-structured using proper Playwright patterns. Two minor non-blocking issues identified: helper function duplication and logout button selector inconsistency across test files, both of which don't affect test execution but indicate gaps in documented conventions.
